title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
